title: SANDBAG LOCATIONS - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY SANDBAG LOCATIONS SANDBAG LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sand and sandbags when there is a risk of flooding. Service details vary by site. 1710 Red Soils Court Suite 225 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when open Email (503) 655-8378 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8378 Main phone Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for service hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Sandbags/Water Diversion Systems If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment.
